title: goodenia psammophila subsp. psammophila
intro: Goodenia psammophila subsp. psammophila, also known as the sand goodenia, is a rare and endemic plant species found in Western Australia. It has been reported to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which can be attributed to the presence of certain bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Goodenia psammophila subsp. psammophila include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant activity. Goodenia psammophila subsp. psammophila can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, or extracts, which can be consumed as teas, capsules, or applied topically in the form of creams or ointments.
